Stories

Voices from the community, shared anonymously and in their own words.

Welcome to the Stories section

An introduction to the community stories that will live here.

April 28, 2026

On staying in

Not every queer Iraqi wants to leave. A reflection on the quiet life of staying — keeping family, keeping language, keeping home, while being yourself in private.

April 19, 2026

The first month

A trans woman in Baghdad describes the first month of HRT — fear, hope, and the small daily choices that made it possible.

April 14, 2026

Iraqi Social Progress Collective

The Iraqi Social Progress Collective is a grassroots mutual aid network for queer Iraqis and questioning people inside Iraq.

Privacy

We do not track visitors. No cookies. No analytics.
